data.title: Shiba Inu’s Hoichi Bridge Goes Live, Opening Doors to 60+ Blockchains and 1,500 Tokens
data.description:
The highly anticipated Hoichi Bridge from Shiba Inu has officially gone live, marking a significant milestone in the project’s development. This innovative bridge opens up a wide array of possibilities by connecting over 60 different blockchains and facilitating transactions involving an impressive selection of more than 1,500 tokens. This substantial expansion not only enhances the interoperability of the Shiba Inu ecosystem but also empowers users with greater flexibility and access to a diverse range of digital assets. With the launch of the Hoichi Bridge, Shiba Inu is set to revolutionize the way users engage with the blockchain space, fostering new opportunities for growth and collaboration within the cryptocurrency community.
source: https://blocknews.com/shiba-inus-hoichi-bridge-live-opening-doors-to-60-blockchains-and-1500-tokens/

data.title: Bitcoin News: Owning BTC Disallowed For Lawmakers Per Pennsylvania HB 1812 Bill
data.description:
In recent Bitcoin news on the regulatory front, Lawmakers in the U. S might soon not be allowed to buy Bitcoin. This is because of the Pennsylvania HB 1812 bill which proposes banning public officials and their families from owning BTC
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/22/bitcoin-news-owning-btc-disallowed-for-lawmakers-per-pennsylvania-hb-1812-bill/

data.title: VanEck files for an S-1 application for a JitoSOL ETF
data.description:
VanEck has filed with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to launch the first-ever spot Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF) fully backed by liquid staking tokens. The JitoSol ETF is in partnership with Jito Labs. According to a Form S-1 filed by VanEck Digital Assets on August 22, the proposed JitoSOL ETF aims to track […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vaneck-files-for-s-1-application-jitosol-etf/
